description: A port of the legendary hackertyper.net website for the Nintendo 3DS.
long_description: # Hackertyper3DS A port of the legendary [hackertyper.net](https://hackertyper.net) website for the Nintendo 3DS. ## Install (FBI) To install the app using the QR code, open FBI on your 3DS and go to "Remote Install" and "Scan QR Code". ## Features - Color switching by pressing the Select button - Speed customization by pressing L+D-Pad Up/Down (1-50 characters per click) - Custom text support by editing the text.txt file (sdmc:/3ds/Hackertyper3DS/text.txt) - Both CIA and 3DSX versions available ## LLM usage While making this project, I used as little LLM generated code as possible, relying more on documentation. However, in the making of the publishing workflow, I did use Claude Code to troubleshoot, as I'm not really experienced with writing those workflows. I also used it to fix some bugs, but made sure that I didn't do that too often and understanding each and every line that it wrote.
